prompt: Create a vertical cyberpunk fantasy portrait of a futuristic geisha angel standing in a rainy neon city at night. She wears an ornate glossy black kimono with embroidered red, white, and silver flowers, metallic armor-like shoulder and chest panels, a structured obi belt, and glowing orange and cyan circuit traces integrated into the fabric. Her hair is styled in a traditional high geisha updo with elaborate kanzashi hair ornaments: red flowers, gold pins, dangling tassels, and white wisteria-like blossoms. Add two enormous mechanical feathered wings extending behind her, one on each side, built from dark chrome blades, cables, glowing blue light strips, and orange circular turbine cores near the shoulders. Pose her dramatically in a three-quarter view: one hand touching a wet wooden pillar on the left, the other hand extended toward the viewer. The face area should be covered by a simple centered opaque square mask in muted gray-purple, hiding all facial features. Background: dense futuristic Japanese alley with rain-slick surfaces, holographic blue data lights, tall buildings, warm lantern glow, and one vertical paper lantern with Japanese characters near the upper right. Use cinematic high contrast lighting, wet reflections, ultra-detailed textures, black lacquer shine, electric cyan and ember-orange rim light, shallow depth of field, realistic fantasy concept art, extremely detailed, dramatic atmosphere, no extra characters, no watermark.
